productDisplayName: John Miller Men Line Navy Blue Trousers
description: Composition Navy blue full length formal trousers with pin stripes, made of polyester and viscose blend, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, brand name embroidered beside right pocket on the front, two buttoned welt pockets on the back, and metal zipper and button closure Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside-out separately in warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Classy trousers are the mark of a gentleman. These navy blue formal trousers from john miller will go a long way in making you the most sophisticated-looking man at any gathering. Made from the choicest of selected fabrics, they are perfectly fitted for office wear and any other formal occasion when you want to look your best effortlessly. Pair them with a crisp formal shirt and leather shoes to look spectacular. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
